# Frontend Design Skill

## Purpose
Build polished, scalable frontend interfaces with consistent styling.

## Use When
- Designing app screens and landing pages
- Setting spacing, color, and typography systems
- Building reusable UI patterns with Tailwind CSS
- Improving visual consistency and responsiveness

## Style Rules
- Prefer Tailwind CSS
- Use design system tokens consistently
- Keep spacing intentional and repeatable
- Avoid inline styles unless absolutely necessary
- Use responsive layouts and clear hierarchy
- Keep the interface cohesive across screens

## Workflow
1. Define the visual direction and tokens.
2. Build reusable layout and component patterns.
3. Apply spacing and typography consistently.
4. Verify responsive behavior.
5. Check the final surface for polish and clarity.
